title: Easy NPC: Config UI
description: Provides a configuration UI for the Easy NPC mod, allowing players to customize NPC settings easily.
body: # 🛠️ Easy NPC: Config UI The _**Easy NPC: Config UI**_ mod adds a **user-friendly configuration interface** for the [_Easy NPC_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc-core) mod. With this UI, players can easily adjust various NPC settings in-game, making customization straightforward and accessible. ## ⚙️ Requirements - ✅ Requires the **Easy NPC: Core** module to function. - ❗ If you're only using [_Easy NPC: Core_](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc-core), **this mod is required** to configure NPCs via a graphical interface. ## ❓ When Do You Need This? Use this mod if: - You want a **GUI-based configuration** for Easy NPC. - You're using the **Core version** only (without the bundled UI). You **don’t need this mod** if: - You're using the full [_Easy NPC bundle_](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc), which already includes the config UI. - You prefer to configure NPCs using **commands** or external config files. ## 👥 Recommended For - Players who prefer **visual interfaces** over commands. - Modpack creators who want to offer an intuitive configuration option. ## Introduction & Overview Video (English)
